tiers.name: Free
tiers.limits: 10 sessions per month, 1 mode, no reference files
tiers.notes: Trial product surface; no commercial use rights

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.limits: Unlimited sessions, all 7 modes, up to 50 reference files per mode, custom modes
tiers.notes: Pro tier is $24/user/mo annual; default upsell target for individual operators

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.limits: Team admin, shared knowledge base, SSO, dedicated support
tiers.notes: Enterprise gated at $20k per year minimum; not part of current Natively individual SKU

discount_policy.policy_owner: Only the founder can authorise a discount below the multi-year floor
